risk_if_not_implemented: Without Inspect Media, residual security, compliance, or resilience risk may accumulate, potentially leading to control failures or non-compliance.

compensating_control_1.name: Configuration Enforcement
compensating_control_1.description: Automated mechanisms exist to monitor, enforce and report on configurations for endpoint devices.
compensating_control_1.justification: Configuration Enforcement (CFG-06) provides configuration hardening that compensates for the absence of Inspect Media (MNT-04.2) by eliminating unnecessary services and enforcing secure settings to reduce inherent exposure. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Maintenance Tools
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to control and monitor the use of system maintenance tools.
compensating_control_2.justification: Maintenance Tools (MNT-04) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Inspect Media (MNT-04.2) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Process applicability. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
